notes_company_source_meeting_idx.name: notes_company_source_meeting_idx
notes_company_source_meeting_idx.where: "notes"."company_id" IS NOT NULL AND "notes"."source_meeting_id" IS NOT NULL

notes_contact_source_meeting_idx.name: notes_contact_source_meeting_idx
notes_contact_source_meeting_idx.where: "notes"."contact_id" IS NOT NULL AND "notes"."source_meeting_id" IS NOT NULL
